zh.Givendale by Ripon, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾吉文代爾 白 利朋
zh.Jacobstow, Cornwall, England: 英國英格蘭可瓦爾亞可布斯托福
zh.lifeSummary: 當Wilmot Jolliffe於1164年3月20日出生在英國越可爾吉賽利時，她的父親William Joliffe24歲，母親Mary Baker25歲。她於1176年與Sir William de la Warde在英國可瓦爾亞可布斯托福結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世於1220年1月27日在英國戴文特可特享年55歲。

zh-hans.Givendale by Ripon, Yorkshire, England: 英国越可爾吉文代爾 白 利朋
zh-hans.Jacobstow, Cornwall, England: 英国英格兰可瓦爾亞可布斯托福
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Wilmot Jolliffe于1164年3月20日出生在英国越可爾吉賽利时，她的父亲William Joliffe24岁，母亲Mary Baker25岁。她于1176年与Sir William de la Warde在英国可瓦爾亞可布斯托福结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。她去世于1220年1月27日在英国戴文特可特享年55岁。

nameMeanings.name: Jolliffe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Jolly
meanings: English, Scottish, and French: nickname for someone of a cheerful or attractive disposition, from Middle English, Old French jolif, joli ‘cheerful, lively, pretty’. In North America, this surname is also an altered form of the most common French variant Joly .

nameMeanings.name: Wilmot
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, which is derived from a medieval pet form (with the Old French diminutive suffix -ot) of William .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

en.lifeSummary: When Wilmot Jolliffe was born on 20 March 1164, in Guiseley, Yorkshire, England, her father, William Joliffe, was 24 and her mother, Mary Baker, was 25. She married Sir William de la Warde in 1176, in Jacobstow, Cornwall, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died on 27 January 1220, in Tetcott, Devon, England, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Wilmot Jolliffe est née le 20 mars 1164, à Guiseley, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, William Joliffe, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Mary Baker, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William de la Warde en 1176, à Jacobstow, Cornouailles, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée le 27 janvier 1220, à Tetcott, Devon, Angleterre, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Wilmot Jolliffe am 20. März 1164 in Guiseley, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Joliffe 24 und ihre Mutter Mary Baker 25. Sie hat 1176 in Jacobstow, Cornwall, England Sir William de la Warde geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb am 27. Januar 1220 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Tetcott, Devon, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Wilmot Jolliffe è nata il il 20 marzo 1164 nel Guiseley, Yorkshire, England, sua padre, William Joliffe, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Mary Baker, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Sir William de la Warde nel 1176, nel Jacobstow, Cornwall, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì il 27 gennaio 1220, nel Tetcott, Devon, England, all'età di 55 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Wilmot Jolliffeが1164年3月20日にイギリスヨークシュアイアグイセリーで生まれた時，父William Joliffeは24歳，母Mary Bakerは25歳であった。1176年にイギリスコルンワルジャコブストウでSir William de la Wardeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼女は1220年1月27日にイギリスデボンテトコットで55歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Wilmot Jolliffe(이)가 1164년 3월 20일 영국 요르크실르 길즈리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Joliffe(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary Baker(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1176년 영국 코른월 재컵스타우에서 Sir William de la Warde(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1220년 1월 27일 영국 데폰 테트컷에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.20 March 1164–27 January 1220: 20 de março de 1164–27 de janeiro de 1220
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Wilmot Jolliffe nasceu em 20 de março de 1164, em Guiseley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Joliffe, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Mary Baker, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William de la Warde em 1176, em Jacobstow, Cornwall, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ela faleceu em 27 de janeiro de 1220, em Tetcott, Devon, Inglaterra, com 55 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Wilmot Jolliffe родилась 20 марта 1164 г. в местности гуисели, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени William Joliffe было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Mary Baker, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William de la Warde в 1176 г. в местности джакобстоу, корнвалл, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла 27 января 1220 г. в местности теткотт, девон, Англия в возрасте 55 лет.

es.20 March 1164–27 January 1220: 20 de marzo de 1164–27 de enero de 1220
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Wilmot Jolliffe nació el 20 de marzo de 1164, en Guiseley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Joliffe, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Mary Baker, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Sir William de la Warde en 1176, en Jacobstow, Cornwall, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió el 27 de enero de 1220, en Tetcott, Devon, Inglaterra, a la edad de 55 años.
